hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -n "$CLAUDE_OVERRIDE_REASON" ]; then echo "{\"ts\":\"$(date -Iseconds)\",\"reason\":\"$CLAUDE_OVERRIDE_REASON\",\"hook\":\"bmad-gate\"}" >> ~/.claude/override-log.jsonl; exit 0; fi; FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$FILE" in *"/app/src/main/"*) for f in docs/prd.md docs/architecture.md .bmad-readiness-passed; do [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"BMAD gate: $f missing.\"}"; exit 0; }; done;; esac'

bash -c 'if [ -n "$CLAUDE_OVERRIDE_REASON" ]; then exit 0; fi; [ -f .codex-review-passed ] && [ "$(jq -r .commit .codex-review-passed)" = "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" ] || echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Run /codex-review-gate before push.\"}"'
